title: "ERROR: Assert `port.addr[j] == State::S0' failed" when in Verific mode
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Use the 'shared_ports' test-case from YosysHQ tests 'tests/memories/shared_ports.v' (https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/master/tests/memories/shared_ports.v)

```
read -sv shared_ports.v                                                             
hierarchy -check -top test
proc
opt_clean
memory -nomap
```

Yosys 0.12+30 (git sha1 ed4642e18, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

## Expected behavior

The test should run without any assertion like in case with 'read_verilog' command:

```
read_verilog -sv shared_ports.v                                                             
hierarchy -check -top test
proc
opt_clean
memory -nomap
```

## Actual behavior

The test fails during MEMORY_SHARE pass with the following assertion.
ERROR: Assert `port.addr[j] == State::S0' failed in kernel/mem.cc:488.
